---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or workflow improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

Describe the problem or friction you're hitting today. "When I do X, I have
to Y, which is painful because Z."

## Proposed solution

What you'd like DepManager to do. Include a CLI example or an API snippet if
that makes it concrete.

```bash
# imagined CLI
depmanager pack ls --outdated
```

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why they aren't enough.

## Additional context

Screenshots, links to related projects, related issues, etc. If this touches
the recipe system or the CMake integration, point to the affected part of
[the developer docs](../../docs/architecture.md).
